title: Ledger
description: Validates a ledger artifact — the chronicle's running continuity state. Produced by publish as a singleton (instance_id 'ledger'); carried by the orchestrator into the next issue's workspace as survey's continuity input. Periodical-level: carries no issue_id and no work_unit.

last_issue.description: issue_id of the most recently published issue.

issues_published.description: All issue_ids published so far, in order.

open_threads.description: Threads still open — inherited-and-still-open threads plus this issue's deferrals. May be empty.

covered.description: What the chronicle has reported so far, so the next issue does not re-report it.

thread_id.description: Stable identifier for the thread across issues.

origin_issue.description: issue_id where the thread was opened.
